$schema: Deep bio generation for full 일주×월지 coverage (465 people)
$goal: Create 1 deep bio per uncovered 일주×월지 combo so every match quiz result has at least one detailed profile
$instructions:
For each billionaire, create a bilingual (English + Korean) deep bio JSON file.

SCHEMA: { id, name, childhood: {birthPlace, birthPlaceKo, familyBackground, familyBackgroundKo, education, educationKo, earlyLife, earlyLifeKo, source}, careerTimeline: [{year, event, eventKo}], failures: [{year, description, descriptionKo, lesson, lessonKo, source}], wealthHistory: [{year, netWorth}], quotes: [{text, textKo, context, contextKo, source}], books: {authored: [{title, why, whyKo}], recommended: [{title, author, note, noteKo}]}, personalTraits: {knownFor, knownForKo, philanthropy, philanthropyKo, controversies, controversiesKo}, sajuConnection: null }

RULES:
- Korean text must be natural fluent Korean
- netWorth in BILLIONS USD
- Only real verifiable quotes
- If info unavailable, use null/empty array
- Save to scripts/deep-bios/c720-{NNN}-{slug}.json
